final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic concept art for a female warrior character from a desert civilization.

Style/medium: game concept art in the visual direction of Assassin's Creed Origins, photorealistic rendering with painterly brushwork
Composition: medium shot at eye level, three-quarter view, 85mm equivalent lens, character centered on elevated platform
Subject: female warrior with pronounced facial structure, resolute eyes, tribal forehead tattoos, wearing armor of brass plate scales mixed with golden silk, edges of plates carved with ancient cuneiform runes
Scene/backdrop: desert ruins with crumbling massive stone columns, half-buried ancient temple in sand, distant sandstorm approaching, ominous orange-yellow sky
Lighting/mood: dramatic theatrical lighting, strong sunlight casting sharp shadows, warm golden rim light, impending storm creates tension
Color palette: dominant warm orange-yellow sky and sand, brass and gold armor as focal point, turquoise and carnelian accents on weapon
Materials/textures: weathered brass with engraved cuneiform, lustrous golden silk fabric, polished turquoise and red agate inlays on scabbard, rough sandstone ruins
Constraints: must include crescent-shaped curved blade with turquoise and carnelian-inlaid scabbard at waist
Avoid: generic fantasy armor, anachronistic elements, deformed anatomy, plastic-looking materials, watermark
